title: Fix warthog player visibility, sprite flip, speed

log.context: Fix warthog player visibility, sprite flip, speed

All three fixes applied, built clean, committed, and pushed. Here's what was done:

**Fix 1 — Hide player avatars when seated in warthog** (`/mnt/data/commons-client/src/renderer.ts`):
- Built a `Set` of all socketIds currently in warthog seats before the remote player render loop
- Remote players whose socketId is in that set are skipped — they're already visible as colored heads on the vehicle
- Local player draw block now guards with `!state.seatedInWarthog`
